title: P3trons PvP Essentials
description: Optimized mod pack enhancing visuals and performance while keeping gameplay smooth. Includes nearly all essential PvP mods, delivering better FPS, improved controls, and a clean, competitive experience for every match.
body:
This mod pack is designed to completely upgrade your look and feel in-game while making everything smoother and more responsive. It enhances visuals without sacrificing performance, giving you a cleaner, sharper, and more modern experience.

Built with PvP in mind, it includes almost all the essential PvP mods you need to stay competitive—better FPS, improved controls, and helpful quality-of-life features that give you an edge in every fight.

Whether you're grinding matches or just want a smoother, better-looking game, this pack delivers the perfect balance of performance, style, and PvP readiness.
